description: Permissive mode. Every bead-shaped ID outside code regions surfaces as bare_mention. bd-target (bare), bd-link (inside markdown link — permissive treats as bare), and bd-far (still emits — no verb proximity needed). Intra-project bt-other is dropped by the cross-project filter.

issues.title: permissive bare mentions
issues.description: bd-target is mentioned. [bd-link](https://example.com) is another one. Much later prose mentions bd-far without any verb, and bt-other stays intra-project.

issues.title: markdown link target (permissive treats as bare)
